'''Landra''' was the smaller of the two continents on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. It was the location of the [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Northwest]] and [[Sky City]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]''
